title: Capstone — Design, Build & Secure a Small Database
description: The whole course in one project, on the Inkwell Books scenario. Model it into an ERD (resolving the order-to-book many-to-many with an associative entity), normalize the fat spreadsheet to 3NF, define it with CREATE TABLE constraints, then query it — a three-join spend aggregate, a NOT IN never-sold subquery, and a LEFT JOIN + COALESCE revenue-by-author — and finally secure it: spot the injectable search, cap the blast radius with least privilege, and expose only what's safe with a view. Ties together Modules 03–12.
